description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:2.7 Docker image, caches the .coverage file and the Google Cloud SDK directory (/usr/local/google-cloud-sdk/), and defines the variables CLOUDSDK_CORE_DISABLE_PROMPTS, DEBIAN_FRONTEND, GOOGLE_API_SECRETS, GOOGLE_CLOUD_KEYFILE_PATH, GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT_ID, GOOGLE_CLOUD_SERVICE_ACCOUNT, PYPI_USER and PYPI_PASSWORD (all set to SECURE). Define four stages: test, coverage, deploy, and cleanup. In the test stage add a unittest job that runs on the mgood/appengine-python image, is excluded for branches matching the regex /^notest/, executes apt-get -q update && apt-get -q install -y libffi-dev libssl-dev libjpeg62-turbo-dev, pip -q install --upgrade pip, pip -q install Pillow, pip -q install -r requirements.txt, pip -q install -r requirements_test.txt, gcloud components update, and python -m webapptitude.test --coverage -f -vvvv -t ./ test/, and stores the .coverage file as an artifact. In the coverage stage add a coverage job that depends on unittest, is also excluded for /^notest/, runs pip -q install coverage followed by coverage report '--include=webapptitude/*'. In the deploy stage add a deploy_pypi job that runs only on tags matching the pattern ^v\d+\.\d+\.\d+([abc]\d*)?$ and not on branches, writes a ~/.pypirc file with the PYPI_USER and PYPI_PASSWORD variables, runs python setup.py check sdist bdist upload, and then clears the .pypirc file; finally, in the cleanup stage add a cleanup_deploy job that always runs on the same tag pattern, not on branches, and removes ~/.pypirc.
